summary.title: Remove hard limits on data fetches
changes: Pump history now includes all events in the last 24 hours without being cut off by a fixed record cap.
Glucose history fetches are no longer capped by a fixed record limit, so extra or manual readings aren't dropped.
Live Activity and Apple Watch data fetches may return more recent records than before.
Background data retrieval no longer uses arbitrary fetch caps, improving completeness of fetched records.
